raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Concrete and cement are a major source of greenhouse gases, accounting for about 7% of carbon emissions globally.",
    "In California, concrete and cement are the second largest industrial source of greenhouse gas emissions, behind only oil refineries.",
    "Concrete makes up about 50% of the mass of all human-made things on our planet.",
    "Emissions from the production and use of concrete contribute about 8 million metric tons of CO2 in California each year.",
    "California is forecast to increase cement production and use of concrete by as much as 42% in the next two decades.",
    "There exist multiple pathways to reduce the carbon footprint of cement and concrete production.",
    "Certain technologies developed by winners of the Carbon XPRIZE can reduce carbon production in the cement and concrete industry.",
    "One technology captures carbon to produce a new type of concrete that absorbs and traps greenhouse gas as it hardens.",
    "California currently has no industrial policy plan for the cement and concrete industries.",
    "Domestic cement manufacturers have laid out a blueprint for decarbonizing the industry."
  ]
}
```
